SETTINGS_PROFILE.TITLE: Vendor profile
SETTINGS_PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Manage the store profile, legal file, banking setup, and review status from one workspace.

COMMAND.ACTIVE_SUBTITLE: Your commercial account is active. Important edits and file re-uploads immediately appear in the admin review workspace.
COMMAND.PENDING_SUBTITLE: Complete the required profile data and official documents, then send the file for review. Every saved update is reflected in the admin side.

WINDOWS.REVIEW_SUMMARY: Official PDFs, legal data, and review readiness.
WINDOWS.OPERATIONS_SUMMARY: Settlement account, payout cycle, and weekly schedule.
WINDOWS.TIMELINE_SUMMARY: Review history, decisions, and recent activity.

UI.REVIEW_HINT: Make sure the commercial registration and tax data match the uploaded documents.

SECTIONS.STORE_HINT: Core business information shown across the vendor panel.
SECTIONS.OWNER_HINT: Personal and contact information for the account owner.
SECTIONS.CONTACT_HINT: Support contacts and the merchant address.
SECTIONS.LEGAL_HINT: Commercial registration, tax details, and operational license.
SECTIONS.DOCUMENTS_HINT: Upload the required PDF documents for compliance and account review.
SECTIONS.OPERATIONS_SETTINGS_HINT: Control order intake, minimum order amount, and preparation timing.
SECTIONS.NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS_HINT: Choose which platform notifications you want to receive.
SECTIONS.HOURS_HINT: Weekly operating availability for receiving and preparing orders.

OPERATIONS.ACCEPT_ORDERS_HINT: Disable this option to temporarily stop receiving new orders.

NOTIFICATIONS.SMS_HINT: Receive important alerts by text message.
NOTIFICATIONS.NEW_ORDERS_HINT: Instant alert whenever a new order arrives.
NOTIFICATIONS.SOUND_HINT: Choose the tone that plays when a real-time vendor alert arrives.

REVIEW_PANEL.TITLE: Documents and review
REVIEW_PANEL.SUBTITLE: This window mirrors what the admin team sees while reviewing your file.

TIMELINE.TITLE: Timeline and follow-up
TIMELINE.SUBTITLE: Track what changed in the file and how the review team is responding.

NOTICES.REOPEN_TITLE: Changes here will reopen this section for review
NOTICES.REOPEN_SUBMITTED: You can still edit, but important updates or file re-uploads will show up to admin as new review work.
NOTICES.REOPEN_CHANGES_REQUESTED: Apply the requested fixes, save, and re-upload rejected files before resubmitting the profile.

ACTIVATION.TITLE: The profile is ready for internal setup, but commercial activation is still blocked
ACTIVATION.BODY: You can complete the remaining profile, legal, and operating setup here, then submit or resubmit the file for compliance review.

MESSAGES.PDF_ONLY: Official documents must be uploaded as PDF files.
MESSAGES.DOCUMENT_UPLOADED: The document was uploaded and synced to the admin review queue.
MESSAGES.DOCUMENT_UPLOAD_FAILED: Unable to upload the document right now.
MESSAGES.SAVE_INVALID: Please complete the required fields before saving the profile.
MESSAGES.SAVE_SUCCESS: Profile changes were saved and synced to the admin workspace.
MESSAGES.SAVE_FAILED: Unable to save profile changes right now.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_INVALID: Complete the required data and documents before submitting for review.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_SUCCESS: The vendor profile was submitted for review and is now visible to admin.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_FAILED: Unable to submit the profile for review right now.

STAFF_BRANCHES.TITLE: Branches & Staff
STAFF_BRANCHES.SUBTITLE: Manage branches, operating teams, and invitation flows from one operational workspace.

SECTIONS.BRANCHES_SUBTITLE: Track your main branch, new branches under review, and operating readiness.
SECTIONS.EMPLOYEES_SUBTITLE: Manage operational roles, branch access, and the current employee status.
SECTIONS.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Resend, revoke, and follow every pending branch manager or employee invitation.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Use focused filters to narrow the current table without leaving the page.

SEARCH.BRANCHES: Search by branch, manager, or code
SEARCH.EMPLOYEES: Search by employee name or contact
SEARCH.INVITATIONS: Search by invitation target or contact

EMPTY.BRANCHES: No branches match the active filters.
EMPTY.EMPLOYEES: No employees match the active filters.
EMPTY.INVITATIONS: No invitations match the active filters.

BRANCH_WIZARD.TITLE: Create a sub-branch under the main store
BRANCH_WIZARD.SUBTITLE: Add operational details, assign coverage, and invite the branch manager in one flow.
BRANCH_WIZARD.PRIMARY_WARNING: A primary branch already exists. New entries will be created as sub-branches pending review.
BRANCH_WIZARD.OPERATING_HOURS_HINT: Choose the operating days for this branch before it goes live.

EMPLOYEE_MODAL.TITLE: Invite an employee
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.SUBTITLE: Send an invitation to a regular email address, assign branch access, and start from a ready-made permission template.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.EDIT_SUBTITLE: Review the role template and fine-tune permissions for the selected employee.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.BRANCH_ACCESS_HINT: Select the branches this employee can operate in.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.BRANCH_ACCESS_LOCKED: Branch access stays locked while editing an existing employee in this v1 flow.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.PERMISSIONS_HINT: Keep the ready template or switch to advanced customization for specific modules.

TEMPLATES.BRANCH_MANAGER_HINT: Best for supervising orders, stock, and offers at one or more branches.
TEMPLATES.ORDERS_CLERK_HINT: Focused on order queue handling, approvals, and shipment follow-up.
TEMPLATES.INVENTORY_CLERK_HINT: Designed for stock updates, inventory checks, and availability changes.

FEEDBACK.BRANCH_CREATED: The new branch was added and a manager invitation was sent by email.
FEEDBACK.EMPLOYEE_INVITED: The employee invitation was sent successfully.
FEEDBACK.LINK_COPY_FALLBACK: Copy failed here. You can still copy the link manually.
FEEDBACK.INVITATION_SEND_FAILED: The invitation email could not be sent. Check the address and email provider, then try again.
FEEDBACK.INVITATION_ACTION_FAILED: The invitation action could not be completed. Please try again.

ACCEPT.TITLE: Create your staff access
ACCEPT.SUBTITLE: You have been invited to join {{vendor}} on Coupony Vendor Panel.
ACCEPT.WEAK_PASSWORD: Enter your name and a password of at least 8 characters.
ACCEPT.FAILED: The invitation could not be accepted. It may have expired or already been used.
ACCEPT.INVALID_BODY: The invitation link is expired, revoked, or already accepted.
ACCEPT.SUCCESS_BODY: You can now sign in with the invited email and the password you just created.

BRANCH.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Key operational information for this branch and its current readiness.
BRANCH.HOURS_SUBTITLE: The active schedule used by this branch across the week.
BRANCH.TEAM_SUBTITLE: Employees currently linked to this branch and their operational role.
BRANCH.EMPTY_TEAM: No employees are linked to this branch yet.
BRANCH.MANAGER_SUBTITLE: Primary contact responsible for this branch.
BRANCH.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: Operational numbers to understand branch readiness at a glance.
BRANCH.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Recent branch-related invitations and their current status.
BRANCH.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this branch.

EMPLOYEE.IDENTITY_SUBTITLE: Identity, role template, and the latest operational activity.
EMPLOYEE.BRANCH_ACCESS_SUBTITLE: Branches this employee can currently operate in.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are assigned to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Invitation records connected to this employee identity.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.PERMISSIONS_SUBTITLE: A read-only view of the effective permissions across operational modules.
EMPLOYEE.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: A compact summary of branch access and invitation coverage.

INVITATION.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Track the target, delivery window, and invitation lifecycle details.
INVITATION.BRANCHES_SUBTITLE: Branches this invitation currently grants access to.
INVITATION.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are linked to this invitation.
INVITATION.LINK_SUBTITLE: Use this direct link when you need to resend or share access manually.
INVITATION.MATCH_SUBTITLE: If the invited person already exists in the team workspace, it appears here.
INVITATION.NO_MATCH: No matching employee was found yet for this invitation.
INVITATION.TIMELINE_SUBTITLE: A quick view of when the invitation was sent and where it stands now.

REVIEWS.TITLE: Customer Reviews Center
REVIEWS.SUBTITLE: Track product and order experience reviews from one workspace, reply as the vendor, and hide reviews when needed without deleting them.

SUMMARY.TOTAL_HINT: All reviews currently stored in this workspace
SUMMARY.PENDING_HINT: Reviews that still need an official vendor response
SUMMARY.HIDDEN_HINT: Reviews currently hidden from the operational view

REVIEWS.SECTION_SUBTITLE: Review every rating, open details, respond to customers, and track what needs attention.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Filter by type, stars, visibility, reply state, and date within the same table.

SEARCH.PLACEHOLDER: Search by customer, product, order number, or comment text

EMPTY.TITLE: No matching reviews
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: Try adjusting the filters or reset the demo data to reload the full review log.

DRAWER.ORDER_BREAKDOWN_SUBTITLE: Internal view of delivery, packaging, and accuracy for this review.
DRAWER.MEDIA_SUBTITLE: Images or screenshots attached to the current review.
DRAWER.REPLY_SUBTITLE: Write a clear professional response that appears as the vendor reply and can be updated later.
DRAWER.REPLY_PLACEHOLDER: Write a short professional reply that explains the action taken or the relevant clarification...

FEEDBACK.REVIEW_HIDDEN: The review was hidden from the current view.
FEEDBACK.SEED_RESET: The demo reviews data was reset.

VENDOR_FINANCE.TITLE: My Wallet
VENDOR_FINANCE.SUBTITLE: Track your balance, settlements, and payout movements with the same operational clarity used in super admin.

ACTIONS.PAYOUT_SUCCESS_MSG: Payout request submitted successfully and is pending review

ALERTS.TITLE: Action Center
ALERTS.EMPTY: All caught up. No new alerts.
